title: NIST Challenging Medically Relevant Genes Benchmark
summary: Hard-region benchmark focused on difficult but medically relevant genes that should not be inferred from easy-region HG002 numbers alone.
usage: measure performance in difficult medically relevant regions
separate supported genes from untrusted genes in public reporting

license.name: Public benchmark resources
license.notes: Verify exact upstream terms for each downloaded artifact before redistribution.

sources.name: NIST Challenging Medically Relevant Genes Benchmark Set
sources.notes: Primary source for hard-region benchmark assets.

artifacts.name: cmrg_regions
artifacts.description: Benchmark regions for challenging medically relevant genes.

artifacts.name: per_gene_scorecard
artifacts.description: Per-gene support output used to gate public claims.

artifacts.name: supported_genes_page
artifacts.description: Human-readable page that explains supported and unsupported genes.

caveats: Only claim support for genes that are directly covered by the benchmark and output artifacts.
Keep unsupported or partial genes close to the limitations section.
